profile.name: Aaryan Sahu
profile.title: Software Developer
profile.summary: Detail-oriented software developer with expertise in Django, Flask, and API integration. Proven ability to deliver innovative web applications and enhance user experiences.

achievements: Developed a Django Rest Framework job hosting platform for companies and job seekers.
Built a Flask web app for remote OBS Studio control via web sockets.
Integrated APIs and migrated systems from Node.js to Django.
Developed Employee Management Software with task status tracking.
Integrated Monaco editor, markdown previewer, and LLM APIs.

projects.title: Handwritten Text Recognition
projects.description: Python project using Tesseract OCR and OpenCV to read and recognize text from handwritten notes, converting them to digital text format.

projects.title: Chain Reaction CLI
projects.description: Multiplayer puzzle game — a command-line prototype of Chain Reaction built entirely in Python.

projects.title: JobMela
projects.description: Job hosting & searching platform built with Django backend and REST framework. Created during internship at Sathee@IITK.

projects.title: Flappy Bird Clone
projects.description: A faithful Flappy Bird clone developed using Python's PyGame library with physics simulation and score tracking.

projects.title: Remote OBS Controller
projects.description: Web application to control multiple OBS Studio instances remotely — managing recording, scenes, and sources via web sockets.
